_meta.note: Article lists are the AUTHOR'S to fill -- 3-8 English Wikipedia article titles per channel, chosen with the same four-category logic as the dictionaries (geography, institutions, doctrine, chokepoints): pick articles a reader would actually visit during a crisis, and verify each title resolves on en.wikipedia.org before adding it. Use canonical titles with spaces (e.g. 'Line of Actual Control'); the fetcher handles URL encoding. Empty lists mean the Wikipedia source stays dormant.
